violations.text: The serving station in the main dining room does not have hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment must install hand sink/moving serving line to be more accessible to installed hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

Raw animal foods (sausage) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in blower fan have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The tile floor by the drain in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2026

The tiles under the warewashing area are in poor repair. Tiles are broken in this area. In addition, the walls in this area observed with peeling paint. These areas are no longer smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
